docs: Constructor that initializes the staking contract
constructors.label: new

docs: Event emitted when an obsolete stake is reallocated
events.label: ObsoleteStakeReallocated

docs: Event emitted when tokens are staked
events.label: Staked

docs: Event emitted when the contract is paused
events.label: ContractPaused

docs: Event emitted when rewards are claimed
events.label: RewardsClaimed

docs: Event emitted when unstaked tokens are claimed
events.label: UnstakedClaimed

docs: Event emitted when the contract is unpaused
events.label: ContractUnpaused

docs: Event emitted when an unstaking request is created
events.label: UnstakeRequested

docs: Event emitted when rewards pool is funded
events.label: RewardsPoolFunded

docs: Event emitted when tier change is received from Registry
events.label: TierChangeReceived

docs: Event emitted when configuration is changed
events.label: ConfigurationChanged

docs: Event emitted when obsolete stakes are detected
events.label: ZombieStakesDetected

docs: Event emitted when mass unstaking is detected and contract is auto-paused
events.label: MassUnstakingDetected

docs: Event emitted when performance fees are claimed
events.label: PerformanceFeeClaimed

docs: Event emitted when zombie cleanup is completed
events.label: ZombieCleanupCompleted

docs: Stake W3PI tokens
messages.label: stake

docs: Request to unstake tokens
messages.label: request_unstake

docs: Claim unstaked tokens that have completed the unstaking period
messages.label: claim_unstaked

docs: Claim staking rewards without unstaking
messages.label: claim_rewards

docs: View function to get claimable rewards
messages.label: get_claimable_rewards

docs: View function to get account stake info
messages.label: get_stake_info

docs: View function to get unstaking requests
messages.label: get_unstaking_requests

docs: View function to get total staked amount
messages.label: get_total_staked

docs: Pause the contract (owner only)
messages.label: pause

docs: Unpause the contract (owner only)
messages.label: unpause

docs: Update the W3PI token address (owner only)
messages.label: set_w3pi_token

docs: Update the registry address (owner only)
messages.label: set_registry

docs: Set portfolio contract (owner only)
messages.label: set_portfolio_contract

docs: Set DEX contract (owner only)
messages.label: set_dex_contract

docs: Set USDC contract (owner only)
messages.label: set_usdc_contract

docs: Check if zombie cleanup is due
messages.label: is_zombie_cleanup_due

docs: Get last zombie cleanup timestamp
messages.label: get_last_zombie_cleanup

docs: Detect zombie stakes (stakes in obsolete tokens)
Use `detect_and_report_zombie_stakes()` for mutable version with events.
messages.label: detect_zombie_stakes

docs: Detect and report zombie stakes (mutable version with event emission)
messages.label: detect_and_report_zombie_stakes

docs: Cleanup zombie stakes - auto unstake obsolete positions.
This should be called during monthly rebalancing.
Flow: Remove stake -> Swap W3PI to USDC via DEX -> Transfer USDC to Portfolio -> Portfolio redistributes
messages.label: cleanup_zombie_stakes

docs: Force unstake an obsolete position for a specific account (owner only).
This function intentionally does NOT check the pause state for emergency recovery.
messages.label: force_unstake_obsolete

docs: Get current unstaking rate and threshold status
messages.label: get_unstaking_rate_info

docs: Reset unstaking detection period (owner only - emergency use)
messages.label: reset_unstaking_detection

docs: Get zombie stake statistics
messages.label: get_zombie_stats

docs: Number of tracked staker addresses.
messages.label: get_staker_count

docs: Paginated staker listing.
messages.label: get_stakers_paginated

docs: Set zombie cleanup interval (owner only)
messages.label: set_zombie_cleanup_interval

docs: Handle tier change notification from Registry (registry only)
messages.label: on_tier_change

docs: Fund the rewards pool with W3PI tokens.
Requires prior approval of tokens to this contract.
Callable by anyone to allow community/treasury contributions.
messages.label: fund_rewards_pool

docs: Get current rewards pool balance
messages.label: get_rewards_pool_balance

docs: Get total rewards distributed (lifetime)
messages.label: get_total_rewards_distributed

docs: Check if rewards pool has sufficient funds for estimated rewards
messages.label: has_sufficient_rewards

docs: Withdraw excess rewards from pool (owner only, for emergency)
messages.label: withdraw_rewards_pool
